name: Anoxic mineral medium (per ref 16) with nitrate; ethane as sole carbon/energy source (PMC10811727)
description: Anoxic mineral medium (per ref 16) with nitrate; ethane as sole carbon/energy source — medium reported in PMC10811727 (complex/undefined base — extracts not BiGG-mappable).

provenance.citation: Medium composition from PMC10811727 (see GrowthDB record).
provenance.notes: Complex medium: chemically-defined portion mapped to BiGG; biological extracts listed in `unmapped`. Added via GrowthDB curation.
provenance.formulation_warning: workflow correction sparse; kept original — STRICTLY ANAEROBIC system (nitrate-driven anaerobic oxidation of ethane by Ca. Alkanivorans nitratireducens); O2 and 'facultative'/aerobic labeling in the current entry are incorrect and were removed. CRITICAL LIMITATION: this paper (PMC10811727) does NOT state the mineral medium composition — it cites it as 'anoxic mineral medium [reference 16]'. The full mineral salt/trace-element/buffer composition is defined in reference 16 (ref rid=ref16), not in this paper, so it cannot be enumerated from this source and MUST be sourced from ref 16 before this medium is considered complete. Only nitrate (electron acceptor) and ethane (sole carbon source) are directly supported here. Confidence low because the mineral base is unresolved. Consider this a partial/incomplete formulation pending retrieval of ref 16; alternatively could be rejected as not-fully-defined-in-source.
provenance.verification_evidence: An anoxic mineral medium [16] of 0.67 and 1.69 l was initially added to the ethane and butane reactor ... Two anaerobic bioreactors seeded with activated sludge and anaerobic digestion sludge ... One was fed with ethane (C2H6) and nitrate ... resulting in the production of dinitrogen gas and ammonium.

components.name: NO3- (nitrate, pulse-fed as stock 80 g NO3-N/L, replenished)

uncovered.name: Ethane (C2H6) headspace partial pressure
uncovered.note: no exchange auto-assigned; propose uptake -1.0 pending manual curation
